subcodes.first_line: O Persian youth! Everyone who praiseth thy forbearance under trials and tribulations - in truth it is even so [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان پارسی هر کس ستایش از تحمل زحمات و مشقات تو مینماید فی الحقیقه چنانست
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
